# Speed Cube Hub — Agent Coordination Log

Shared log for parallel Claude Code sessions. Each session appends entries when running `/sync`.

**Newest entries at the bottom.** Oldest entries get trimmed when the log exceeds 50 entries (old ones are preserved in git history).

**Do not edit this file by hand.** It is managed by the `/sync` skill.
